name: Survive from the latex beasts RPG
description:
You must try to survive in a world destroyed by latex beasts or become one of them.

There are some countries that are still safe from the latex beast but very few because less than 5 countries are still safe from the latex beast.

There are survivor camps all over the world, survivors will try to survive against the latex beast by fighting or running or hiding.

Each survivor camp will be different, some with more soldiers, some with more survivors.

Each survivor camp has a different progression, some with more resources, some with fewer resources.

The latex beasts have different colors and each color has different abilities and such as(

1. Latex beasts with red patterns have fire-related abilities, and they can spit fire from their mouths for close-range attacks or shoot fireballs for long-range attacks, but they are weak against water.

2. Latex beasts with purple patterns have the power of telekinesis, and they can create an invisible barrier around them at all times, blocking all types of attacks, but depending on the strength of the barrier.

3. Latex beasts with a glowing orange patterns has hypnotic abilities, and if any creature looks at its eyes, their eyes will spiral into multi-colored spirals, which can hypnotize the living creature that looks at thay eyes, but it depends on the hypnotized creature's mind being strong enough to escape the hypnosis or not.

4. Latex beasts with a gray patterns have the abilities of imitation, and they can imitate the appearance or actions or habits of every living creature they see, making them is one of the most dangerous type of latex beast.

5. Latex beasts with yellow patterns have electrical abilities and they can move at lightning speeds and shock other creatures with their electrical abilities, they can also shoot electricity to attack enemies from close to long range, making them is one of the most dangerous type of latex beast.

6. Latex beasts with neon lime green patterns have poison abilities that can kill living creatures if touched, but they can choose the amount of poison they release and if they choose to release less poison, creatures exposed to their poison will simply faint.

7. White latex beasts, their bodies were covered in white latex, their faces had no eyes, only mouths, what makes them unique is that they have Hivemind, which allows all of them to communicate with each other over long distances, they can also merge to form very large bodies, they will build settlements by pouring their white latex into the environment where they will settle, causing everything in the area to be covered in white latex and in their habitat, white latex trees and white latex pillars are the most visible things, and their habitat is called the white latex jungle and they are the natural enemies of the dark latex beasts, white latex beasts are the smartest latex beasts because of their Hivemind and they can speak to lure humans closer to them.

8. Dark latex beasts, their bodies were covered in dark latex, although the dark latex beasts did not have any special powers, they were quite fiercer than the other latex beasts and hunted their prey in groups and were extremely violent and they are natural enemies of white latex beasts.

9. Latex beasts with a sky blue patterns have the ability to turn invisible. )
creator: TNSz
